summary: Iteration 180: Pacco Documenti Cantiere (Pulsante Magico) - Complete testing of unified PDF generation for mixed commesse. Backend: 14 API tests passed. PDF structure verified with correct Cover+Index, PARTE A (EN 1090) with CONFORME verbale, PARTE B (EN 13241) with NON CONFORME verbale + warning, PARTE C (Generica) with riepilogo ore. Frontend: Pacco Documenti button confirmed with data-testid='btn-pacco-magico' in CommessaHubPage.
critical_code_review_comments: pacco_documenti.py: Well-structured PDF generator with clean HTML templating via WeasyPrint
Cover page includes: company logo, PACCO DOCUMENTI CANTIERE title, commessa numero, title, client name, date, and dynamic INDICE
PARTE A (EN 1090): Correctly includes certificati 3.1, foto, verbale collaudo auto-compiled from checklist, riepilogo ore
PARTE B (EN 13241): Correctly includes foto sicurezza, verbale collaudo with NON CONFORME warning when checklist has NOK items
PARTE C (Generica): Correctly shows only riepilogo ore (no verbale, no certificati)
Filtro Beltrami implemented: _doc_matches_voce() correctly filters documents by voce_id
Firma tecnica area includes auto-generation disclaimer: 'Documentazione generata automaticamente dal sistema di controllo produzione'
Minimalismo: PDF only generates parts for existing categories (verified with 4-page PDF for mixed commessa)
CommessaHubPage: Button styled with emerald-600 background, shadow effect, FileText icon
seed_data_creation: Test data pre-created by main agent: commessa with EN_1090 (all_ok=True → CONFORME), EN_13241 (all_ok=False → NON CONFORME), GENERICA voci
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pacco Documenti fully implemented. Key test IDs: btn-pacco-magico (download button in CommessaHubPage header). PDF endpoint: GET /api/commesse/{id}/pacco-documenti returns application/pdf with attachment header. PDF structure: page 1 = cover+index, pages 2-4 = PARTE A/B/C. Checklist automation: all_ok=True → CONFORME badge, all_ok=False → NON CONFORME badge + ATTENZIONE warning. Filtro Beltrami: documents with voce_id only appear in matching section.

pdf_content_structure.cover_page: ✓ PACCO DOCUMENTI CANTIERE, commessa numero, client, date, INDICE
pdf_content_structure.parte_a_en_1090: ✓ Certificati 3.1, Foto, Verbale Collaudo (CONFORME), Riepilogo Ore
pdf_content_structure.parte_b_en_13241: ✓ Foto Sicurezza, Verbale Collaudo (NON CONFORME), ATTENZIONE warning, Riepilogo Ore
pdf_content_structure.parte_c_generica: ✓ Only Riepilogo Ore (no verbale, no certificati)

backend_api_tests.minimalismo: ✓ Only relevant parts included (no empty sections)
backend_api_tests.filtro_beltrami: ✓ Documents with voce_id correctly filtered to matching section
